---
title: "Research"
format: html
editor: visual
---

My work intersects psychiatry, genomics, and sociology, using innovative statistical approaches to integrate large-scale longitudinal data to better understand mental health.

**I lead three programs of research:**

### 1. Social isolation and mental health

I explore the link between experiences of social isolation and mental health from childhood to young adulthood through assessing longitudinal trends, bidirectional associations, and genetic overlap. I am a member of the Lonliness Working Group.

::: paper-row
<a href="https://doi.org/10.1002/jcv2.12073"> <img src="images/JCPPA.png" class="paper-img"/> </a>

<a href="https://doi.org/10.1016/j.jaacop.2023.02.001"> <img src="images/JAACAPO.png" class="paper-img"/> </a>

<a href="https://doi.org/10.1007/s00787-024-02573-w"> <img src="images/ECAP.png" class="paper-img"/> </a>
:::

### 2. Large-scale data and depression

I quantify how large-scale data reflecting experiences across the life span contribute to depression symptoms.

::: paper-row
<a href="https://doi.org/10.1002/da.23213"> <img src="images/D&amp;A.png" class="paper-img"/> </a>

<a href="https://doi.org/10.1016/j.ssmph.2025.101886"> <img src="images/SSM.png" class="paper-img"/> </a>

<a href="https://osf.io/preprints/psyarxiv/wf52a_v1"> <img src="images/SPPE.png" class="paper-img"/> </a>
:::

### 3. Genetics and society

I demonstrate how genetics is embedded within societal context, through testing social mitigation of genetic effects as well as actively developing anti-deterministic genetic teaching materials. I am a member of the Responsible Genetics Collective.

::: paper-row
<a href="https://osf.io/preprints/psyarxiv/j5drc_v1"> <img src="images/Science.png" class="paper-img"/> </a>

<a href="https://doi.org/10.1007/s10519-026-10251-7"> <img src="images/BG.png" class="paper-img"/> </a>

<a href="https://doi.org/10.1016/j.xhgg.2025.100548"> <img src="images/HGG.png" class="paper-img"/> </a>
:::

------------------------------------------------------------------------
